channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Outside 29, 20th April
item.description:
Mattress dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harvist Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Untaxed Vehicle, 20th April
item.description:
This vehicle has no tax and shouldn't be parked here

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sun Lane, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter and detritus, 20th April
item.description:
The whole length of this section of Limes Road needs cleaning

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Limes Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Doesn't have correct tax to be parked on a public road, 20th April
item.description:
This car has been sat here since September and was reported to this site in November but nothing seems to have happened. It has had no MOT since September 2025 and it has a SORN tax code which clearly states it should not be parked on a public road, but it is and has been for months

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sun Lane, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over grown tree damage property fence, 20th April
item.description:
Over grown tree needs cutting down. Back of the garden in council garages

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 52, Sherborne Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pram, shopping cart fly tipping, 20th April
item.description:
People continually fly tip here from around the neighborhood. This had been going on by it years and needs to be addressed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lilian Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please reinstate a tree pit, 20th April
item.description:
I am hoping that you will look favourably at the prospect of reinstating a tree pit outside number 63. There was originally a tree and pit that was covered over a number of years ago and I have on numerous occasions requested that it would be fantastic to have this put back !
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66, Brabourne Rise, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Possible garden waste blocking the pavement, 20th April
item.description:
It's been there for more than 1 week.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sheridan Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 20th April
item.description:
Dumped bin bags and clothing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Astbury Road, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Temple Heath Lodge, 33 Templewood Avenue NW3 7UY - Subsidence in road, 20th April
item.description:
Temple Heath Lodge, 33 Templewood Avenue NW3 7UY - Subsidence in road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33, Templewood Avenue, West Hampstead, Greater London

item.title: Rubbish, 20th April
item.description:
Black bags of rubbish blown all all ravine grove SE18

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Slade, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Community charity shop Pickford lane, 20th April
item.description:
Omg there are bags of clothing grass cuttings again being dumped all over the parade in Pickford lane! Something needs to be done I have reported this before as grass cuttings are everywhere and normally the shredded paper normally drifts over the parade and along to the flats in Pickford lane. Today it was terrible as I passed I didn’t have time to take a pic but the residents of this shop need to address this issue to you as happening every week!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickford Lane, Welling, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 40 Bags of building material, 20th April
item.description:
40 bags of building materials have been dumped next to the Evergreen Adventure Playground, 9 Beehive Close, London, E8 3JT. There is also fly-tip[ping on the other side of the road. --
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Beehive Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant stret and pavement littering by neighbours, 20th April
item.description:
The occupants at 58 Northumberland Park consistently litter the pavement and street. Their rubbish bags are left outside and foxes go through them at night making mess all over and this is not cleaned by the occupants but left all over the street and pavement making it difficult for children and adults to walk on the pavement. And it’s very unhygienic and attracts more rodents. This is continuous issue which I believe was reported by other neighbours previously. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Northumberland Park, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped furniture, 20th April
item.description:
Furniture dumped on the street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 56, Maple Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Barrers stolen over the weekend, need replacing as they are supporting a dangerous wall., 20th April
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lavidge Road, Eltham

item.title: Overgrown Bush, 20th April
item.description:
This overgrown bush belonging to house 39 obstructs then pavement and the view of the road. You cannot see incoming cars. Https://maps.app.goo.gl/zNLasa1DfGdx2FE97?g_st=ic

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rectory Grove, Clapham, Greater London

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Leysdown Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive Litter, 20th April
item.description:
I thought I would flag this because I lived here 3 years and it's only recently that I've noticed the street getting increasingly dirty, we would really appreciate a clean. This seems to happen especially after the bins are collected

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cester Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
